column1: Dataset Title: Russian Arctic Vegetation Archive: Parisento lake (G4) Vegetation Plots

Dataset Reference: Telyatnikov, M.Yu., Khitun. O.V., Chernyadyeva. I.V., Kuzmina, E.Yu. & Ermokhina, K.A. (2021). Novyye dannyye o rastitelnosti dvukh rayonov yuzhnoy chasti podzony tipichnykh tundr Gydanskogo poluostrova [New vegetation data of two areas located in southern part of Gydan peninsula typical tundra]. Turczaninowia, 24(3), 5–23. https://doi.org/10.14258/turczaninowia.24.3.1.
Dataset Table: Modified Species Cover Data for Parisento lake (G4)

Dataset Notes: Percentage species cover scale is used for vascular plants and bryophytes. Braun-Blanquet cover-abundance scale is used for lichens: r (rare), + (common, but less than 1 percent), 1 (1 to 5 percent), 2 (6 to 25 percent), 3 (26 to 50 percent), 4 (51 to 75 percent), and 5 (76 to 100 percent). Taxa are listed in alphabetical order. Both the dataset author determinations and the current nomenclature according to the Panarctic Species List (PASL) are listed.
